auditTrail.summary: DOM baseline generated structured page context.
Noise and high-signal blocks were classified deterministically.
Digest items were generated from high-signal blocks.
SourceRefs include textQuote or fallbackText for jumpback.

sourceRefs.fallbackText: WICKED above her hipbone, GIRL across her heart Words are like a road map to reporter Camille Preaker’s troubled past. Fresh from a brief stay at a psych hospital, Camille’s first assignment from the second-rate daily paper where she works brings her reluctantly back to her hometown to cover the murders of two preteen girls. NASTY on her kneecap, BABYDOLL on
